remaining_tasks.name: Execute Phase 4 — run all 5 plans across 3 waves

wave_structure.summary: Wave 0 scaffold: starterKit fork, Auth.js v5 edge-split, CSP, Vitest/Playwright harness, .NET red placeholders, Keycloak audience mapper + admin client
Auth+account portal; Flight search+booking UI w/ Stripe Elements; Hotel search+booking + voucher email pipeline
Car hire + Trip Builder; single-PI partial-capture basket per D-08/D-10; unified ?ref=kind-id checkout; combined email

human_actions_pending.action: Manual Keycloak admin provisioning of tbe-b2c-admin service client (client_credentials, view-users + manage-users roles)
human_actions_pending.context: Required by 04-00 Task 3 user_setup; gates 04-02 Task 3 resend-verify pre-flight via infra/keycloak/verify-audience-smoke.sh

human_actions_pending.action: Stripe test-mode keys + webhook signing secret in .env.test
human_actions_pending.context: Required by Wave 0 (04-00 Task 1b) for Stripe PaymentElement smoke + E2E checkout

decisions.decision: Single combined Stripe PaymentIntent with capture_method=manual + sequential partial captures (AmountToCapture, FinalCapture=false then true)
decisions.rationale: Honors locked CONTEXT D-08 (one charge on customer statement) + D-10 (two-stage capture mapped to flight-ticketed + hotel-confirmed). Two-PI alternative explicitly rejected.

decisions.decision: Unified checkout URL contract: ?ref={kind}-{id} via lib/checkout-ref.ts parseCheckoutRef/buildCheckoutRef
decisions.rationale: Reconciles 04-02 (?booking=), 04-03 (?hotelBookingId=), 04-04 (?basketId=) divergence into one shape. Implemented in 04-04 Task 3b which modifies 04-02 checkout pages.

decisions.decision: Hotel voucher PDF: streaming pass-through from NotificationService only (D-16). Local regeneration in BookingService removed.
decisions.rationale: Single source of truth — emailed attachment and downloaded PDF must be byte-identical.

decisions.decision: Frontend stack pinned: Auth.js v5.0.0-beta.31, Next 16.1.6, @stripe/stripe-js 9.2.0, @stripe/react-stripe-js 6.2.0, nuqs 2.8.9, @tanstack/react-query 5.99.0, react-day-picker 9.14.0, vitest 2.x, Playwright 1.x
decisions.rationale: Verified against npm 2026-04-16; Auth.js still beta — pin EXACT version.

decisions.decision: Metronic starterKit kept as .jsx with allowJs:true; new code in .ts/.tsx
decisions.rationale: Pitfall 17 — avoid migration scope creep on Phase 4.

decisions.decision: Playwright E2E moved to <wave_verify>; per-task <automated> is vitest/dotnet only
decisions.rationale: Nyquist 120s feedback latency budget — Playwright is too slow per-task.

Capstone plan reuses payment-element-wrapper from 04-02, HotelBookingConfirmed event + EmailType.BasketConfirmation + BookingDbContext from 04-03; ordering required for EF migrations + MassTransit consumers.

next_action: /clear, then run /gsd-execute-phase 4 to execute Wave 1 (04-00 scaffold) → Wave 2 (04-01/02/03 in parallel) → Wave 3 (04-04 capstone)
context_notes: Phase 4 planning complete in 1 revision iteration. Initial planner reversed locked CONTEXT D-08/D-10 (silently switched to two-PaymentIntent option); revision restored single-PI + partial-capture per CONTEXT. All 21 phase REQ-IDs covered (B2C-01..08, HOTB-01..05, CARB-01..03, PKG-01..04, NOTF-02). Key risks for execution: (1) manual Keycloak admin provisioning required before 04-02 can pass pre-flight smoke; (2) Auth.js v5 still beta — Wave 0 must validate compatibility with Next 16 + nuqs 2.8 before downstream waves; (3) Stripe sequential partial captures within authorization window must use FinalCapture=false then FinalCapture=true correctly — covered in 04-04 acceptance criteria with grep checks.
